Short journeys made to expand one's business will prove to be profitable.
Jupiter in his own constellation in Vlsal<am 4th pada forebodes eMlly,
itigation. law suits. loans and unavoidable worries. As lord of 3 in his star
Pooratta<lhi. it shows that he will invest on properties in the

pubkations etc .. will result in loss of money and prestige. As lord of 3 in
